# Transformative Wellness — llms.txt

## About
Transformative Wellness is a physician-led medical spa in Vista, California (North County San Diego). MD-owned, twice named "Best Medical Spa in North County" (2025, 2026). The practice is built around an "ethical med spa" philosophy — clinically right-sized recommendations, never high-pressure sales. Providers follow a 3-Line Recommendation playbook: thorough when it serves the patient, restrained when it doesn't.

**Location:** 969 Vale Terrace Drive, Suite B, Vista, CA 92084
**Phone:** (858) 444-0414
**Website:** https://transformativemedspa.com/
**Email:** info@transformativemedspa.com

## Service Menu (Updated May 2026 — TW Menu v3.1)

### Tier 1: The Edit Line — $79–349
Short, focused treatments (30–45 minutes) designed as a low-friction entry to aesthetic care. Includes the Hydration Edit, Skin Edit, Glow Edit, Body Definition Edit, Recovery Edit, Lip Edit, and Brow Edit.

### Tier 2: Concern Packages — $399–3,499
Multi-session packages built around a single specific concern. Three commitment tiers per concern: Reset (entry), Protocol (mid), Authority (comprehensive). Featured concerns include Skin Laxity, GLP-1 Recovery, Aging Gracefully, and The Bride.

### Tier 3: The Method — $1,499–5,499
3–6 month provider-designed transformation programs combining multiple modalities. Six Methods: The Glow, The Definition, The Sculpt, The Reset, The Longevity, The Bride.

### Tier 4: The Metamorphosis — $9,999+ (application only)
Pinnacle comprehensive transformation. Not publicly bookable.

### Membership: Beauty Bank
Monthly membership with: $100/month off GLP-1 (ongoing), 10% off all retail, monthly credit (rolls over up to 4 months), $50 birthday credit + free Edit, complimentary guest pass, VIP body-area add-on, and Member's Choice Quarterly Service.

## Primary Treatments

**Injectables:** Botox, Dysport, dermal fillers, Sculptra (biostimulator), RF skin tightening
**Laser & Energy:** ClearLift, CO2 Deka, CoolPeel, Soprano Titanium Lift, Dye-VL IPL (vascular lesions), Potenza RF microneedling, BTL Exilis (face + Femme intimate restoration), BTL Cellutone
**Body Contouring:** Ultrasonic cavitation, RF skin tightening, laser lipo
**Wellness:** Semaglutide / Tirzepatide (GLP-1 weight loss), IV therapy (NAD+, Myers Cocktail, hydration), vitamin shots, wood-tool lymphatic drainage
**Aesthetics:** Microdermabrasion, facials, chemical peels, lash lifts + tints, brow lamination, laser hair removal, waxing/sugaring, tattoo removal

## Clinical Philosophy

Transformative Wellness specializes in collagen-building approaches (Sculptra biostimulator, Potenza RF microneedling, BTL Exilis RF) for volume loss, skin laxity, and aging — prioritized over neurotoxin-only plans. GLP-1 weight loss patients are typically paired with skin tightening protocols to address loose skin, which most clinics don't address. Ablative laser treatments (CO2 Deka, deep peels) are scheduled for fall and winter, not summer, to prevent post-inflammatory hyperpigmentation.

## Service Area

Vista, Carlsbad, Oceanside, San Marcos, Escondido — and broader North County San Diego.
